user.title: EDF Energy Account
user.description: Enter your EDF Energy account credentials. You can find your account number in the [EDF Energy app or website]({edf_account_url}).

data.supports_live_consumption: I have a SMETS2 smart meter (enables live consumption sensors)

data_description.calorific_value: Used to convert gas consumption to kWh. Check your bill — usually around 40.0
data_description.supports_live_consumption: Only enable if you have a SMETS2 smart meter. Enables live demand, current consumption and accumulative cost sensors

data.supports_live_consumption: I have a SMETS2 smart meter

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password — please check your EDF Energy login details
error.account_not_found: Account not found — please check your account number
error.unknown: Unexpected error — please check the logs

abort.already_configured: This EDF Energy account is already configured

invalid_credentials.title: EDF Energy — Invalid Credentials
invalid_credentials.description: Authentication failed for account {account_id}. Please reconfigure the integration with your correct email and password.

account_not_found.title: EDF Energy — Account Not Found
account_not_found.description: Account {account_id} could not be found. Please check your account number and reconfigure.

no_active_tariff.title: EDF Energy — No Active Tariff
no_active_tariff.description: No active tariff found for {meter_type} meter {mpan_mprn}/{serial_number} on account {account_id}. Rates will not update until a tariff is active.

tariff_rates_empty.title: EDF Energy — Empty Rates
tariff_rates_empty.description: No rates returned for tariff {tariff_code} (product {product_code}) on meter {mpan_mprn}/{serial_number} ({meter_type}). This may be temporary — the integration will retry automatically.

meter_added.title: EDF Energy — New Meter Detected
meter_added.description: A new {meter_type} meter ({mprn_mpan}/{serial_number}) has been detected on account {account_id}. Please restart Home Assistant to register the new sensors.

meter_removed.title: EDF Energy — Meter Removed
meter_removed.description: The {meter_type} meter ({mprn_mpan}/{serial_number}) on account {account_id} is no longer active. You may want to remove associated entities.
